payload.claim_text: For services beyond 2023, the Railroads (led by LIRR) will be conducting a new joint competitive procurement during the extension period, which will include an industry review of available technologies and service providers prior to selection and award recommendation to the Board
payload.subject: Railroads

payload.claim_text: Five firms expressed interest in participating in the procurement

The Contract was modified for (1) the addition of Eddy current testing; (2) a change in MNR's practice of stop/verify rail testing to continuous rail testing, after MNR received approval from the FRA to conduct such testing; (3) the three-month contract extension; and (4) the addition of funding in the amount of $2.6 million
payload.subject: Contract No. 1-80846

payload.claim_text: Pricing for the extension is determined to be fair and reasonable
By detecting and analyzing otherwise invisible flaws, the rail can be replaced before a failure occurs which improves track safety
